## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered growth services to Mejuri and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven workflows for content creation, research, and e-commerce optimization, with a focus on delivering as a service rather than a platform](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Rohit (Mejuri) is interested in leveraging AI for customer segmentation, competitor research, and catalog enrichment to improve natural language search](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to schedule a deeper 1-hour follow-up call to discuss specific use cases and potentially initiate an 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Service Overview

  - [Built a coding agent that creates workflows in code with a runtime layer on top](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Utilizes 70+ APIs for content creation, research, and data processing](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering results as a service, with forward-deployed AI engineers and infrastructure teams](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Adapts quickly to evolving AI landscape, avoiding limitations of a generalized platform](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Mejuri's Growth Priorities

  - [Rohit oversees product engineering and most marketing departments](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - Key focus areas:
      - [Adapting to changing consumer shopping behavior](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [Leveraging new technologies and features from platforms like Google and Meta](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Enhancing product catalog and personalization journeys](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Improving team efficiency through automation and value-added activities](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Use Case Exploration

  - [Customer segmentation analysis and simulation](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Competitor research, especially ad strategies on platforms like Meta](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Catalog enrichment to improve natural language search capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Clickstream analysis for building user personas based on actual website behavior](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### GrowthX's Relevant Experience

  - [Worked with Bolt.new to enrich session data, providing valuable insights beyond raw usage data](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Experience with large-scale e-commerce projects (e.g., Walmart, Meta's Instagram shopping launch)](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Strong background in editorial content, which translates well to e-commerce catalog enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Engagement Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint with no long-term commitment (mutual opt-out option)](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Defines use cases while delivering real results during the process](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Typically 6 weeks out due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Selective about partnering with brands](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a 1-hour deep dive call for the following week](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to bring Dave (former TripAdvisor SEO head) to provide additional e-commerce and SEO insights](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [GrowthX team to research Mejuri's brand and prepare specific e-commerce use cases for discussion](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Explore potential for an 8-week strategy sprint partnership](https://fathom.video/share/yewPm9ETnx3MMaQ-goTHP6FBEhzg_7Pa?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
